self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Desert Watch (R1): ATK +20% for 8s after the wielder's Elemental Skill hits an opponent, and a further ATK +20% for 8s after the wielder takes DMG (both trigger off-field too). Modeled with both procs active simultaneously (+40%). The Max HP +32% (self_modifiers_json) assumes the wielder is not shielded, per its 'while not protected by a shield' condition.
